subject: docs: fix ~30 documentation-vs-code discrepancies
body:
Full codebase audit comparing all documentation against actual code.

README.md: rewritten for React/Vite era (was pre-migration), 4→6 tabs,
added project structure with all components/hooks/scripts.

CLAUDE.md: 5→6 tabs (added Projects), expanded components list (5 missing),
added js/hooks/ and js/chartColors.js, fixed extract-api.js description.

USER_GUIDE.md: removed Privacy Mode and Share/PDF ghost features,
updated Summary Cards to actual ones, updated 18 Discover metric labels
to plain language names, added Projects tab, fixed filter mode labels.

ADMIN_GUIDE.md: fixed auto-loading data (was claiming multi-path, actual
is ./data.json only), replaced gh CLI section with token-based setup
(extract-api.js uses curl), fixed static server instructions.

SESSION_NOTES.md: corrected false manifest.js deletion claim, fixed tab
count and View Level location references.

AppContext.jsx: added What/Why/Alternatives decision documentation to
split context pattern.

complexity: 2
urgency: 2
impact: internal
risk: low
debt: paid

https://claude.ai/code/session_0174YkWN9swC4ktMWVy4nvMF
title: fix ~30 documentation-vs-code discrepancies
